_comment: Per-age enemy archetypes for the prototype concept-demo. One archetype per age, keyed by age id from ages.json. Stats are [PROPOSAL] and ride the existing wave-compounding curve in BALANCE.wave (HP/COUNT/SPEED/REWARD/GAP per-wave multipliers). Each enemy archetype maps to the age's era theme — primal swarmers → Atomic-age hazmat-suits → Stellar orbital drones → Ascendant light-motes. Visual fields (color, glyph) feed Phase 10.2 canvas rendering. Port target: Godot 4 Resource array (res://data/enemies/*.tres). All numbers and names [PROPOSAL] per §5.4 and 2026-04-20 pivot.

primal.label: Pelt-Runner
primal.flavor: Hide-clad runners. Paint on their faces, stones in their fists.

mudbrick.label: Clay-Soldier
mudbrick.flavor: Spear-grass and sun-baked shields. The first standing armies.

iron.label: Hoplite
iron.flavor: Bronze greaves, aspis shields, a discipline inherited from Sparta and Qin alike.

spires.label: Mail-Knight
spires.flavor: Chainmail and tabard. The banner first, the horse second, the knight a distant third.

alchemical.label: Musketeer
alchemical.flavor: Powder-smoke and a long wait between volleys. Alchemy weaponized for the first time.

steamheart.label: Armored-Line
steamheart.flavor: Iron-plated and boiler-driven. A wall that walks, fueled by coal.

atomic.label: Hazmat-Squad
atomic.flavor: Lead-lined suits. The first enemies that punish proximity rather than reward distance.

signal.label: Drone-Swarm
signal.flavor: Uplinked, coordinated, above the lane. The first waves that share a mind.

synthetic.label: Vat-Myrmidon
synthetic.flavor: Lab-grown soldiers. The first waves that heal between ticks.

stellar.label: Orbital-Drop
stellar.flavor: Dropped from vacuum. A tower that killed a Rampart-age foe meets something the rampart was not imagined for.

ascendant.label: Light-Mote
ascendant.flavor: A wave that arrives already past. The final test of whether your line, raised from the first garden, holds.
